We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our
Cookie Policy

Most tools work in isolation.
HubSpot works in context
When your tools and data are connected on one platform, your teams and AI have complete context to do their best work.
Marketing is more personal, sales outreach is more insightful, and service issues are resolved faster.

HubSpot's Agentic Customer Platform

Previous
Next
A CRM that’s really smart.
HubSpot’s Smart CRM is the single source of truth that connects all your business data.
Products that connect to everything.
Unify your teams to create content, find leads, close deals, and grow revenue.

Built-in AI tools boost productivity, scale growth, and unlock insights.

Growing a business is hard. HubSpot makes it easier.
Disconnected tools and data slow you down. HubSpot connects everything — and everyone — in one place to make growing a business easier than you think.

We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our

Benchmarking Hubspot's S-1: How Key SaaS Metrics Stack Up
HubSpot to cut 500 jobs, or 7% of its workforce

analysis.name: HubSpot
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one customer platform combining marketing, sales, service, content, and data on a single AI-powered CRM so growing businesses don't have to stitch together multiple tools.
analysis.ideal_customer: B2B companies from startup to enterprise wanting an integrated CRM, marketing automation, and sales platform with a low barrier to entry via a free tier.

features.name: smart crm
features.description: AI-powered flexible CRM for contacts, companies, deals, and tickets with a free tier

features.name: contact management
features.description: Store and organize contact records with default and custom properties

features.name: record import
features.description: Bulk import contacts, companies, deals, and other objects via CSV

features.name: user management
features.description: Add and manage HubSpot user accounts and role-based permissions

features.name: personal email integration
features.description: Connect Gmail or Outlook to log emails and track opens directly in the CRM

features.name: domain connection
features.description: Connect custom domains to HubSpot for websites, landing pages, and email sending

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: No-code automation engine for marketing, sales, and service processes

features.name: marketing hub
features.description: Full marketing automation suite covering email, ads, social, SEO, and campaigns

features.name: marketing automation campaigns
features.description: Multi-channel drip campaigns built with visual automation and AI assistance
features.evidence_quote: Create campaigns with automation and AI.

features.name: lead generation forms and landing pages
features.description: Forms and landing pages to convert website visitors into CRM contacts
features.evidence_quote: Convert visitors into contacts for your database.

features.name: sales hub
features.description: Sales engagement and pipeline software for prospecting, outreach, and closing

features.name: sales pipeline management
features.description: Visual deal pipeline to track and manage opportunities through stages
features.evidence_quote: Generate a pipeline of high-quality prospects.

features.name: deal management
features.description: Create, update, and close deals with associated contacts, companies, and tasks
features.evidence_quote: Streamline your process and close more deals faster.

features.name: service hub
features.description: Customer service software including help desk, tickets, and knowledge base

features.name: help desk and ticketing
features.description: Shared inbox and ticket management system for support teams
features.evidence_quote: Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.

features.name: customer retention tools
features.description: Tools to monitor customer health and identify churn risk early
features.evidence_quote: Identify opportunities to improve customer health.

features.name: content hub
features.description: Content marketing platform for creating, managing, and distributing content with AI

features.name: content management system
features.description: Website and blog CMS for building and managing web content
features.evidence_quote: Organize, update, and distribute content in one place.

features.name: ai content creation
features.description: AI-assisted writing and content generation tools built into the content hub
features.evidence_quote: Easily craft content for your audience, with help from AI.

features.name: data hub
features.description: Data management platform for data quality, custom objects, and integrations

features.name: commerce hub
features.description: CPQ, billing, payments, and subscription management built into HubSpot

features.name: cpq (configure price quote)
features.description: Build and send professional sales quotes with configurable pricing

features.name: payments processing
features.description: Accept payments directly inside HubSpot without leaving the CRM

features.name: breeze ai platform
features.description: Unified suite of AI agents and AI features powering the entire HubSpot platform
features.evidence_quote: AI agents and features that power the entire platform

features.name: ai customer agent
features.description: AI-powered agent that resolves customer support queries 24/7 autonomously

features.name: ai prospecting agent
features.description: AI agent that identifies and engages high-value leads for sales teams automatically
features.evidence_quote: Identify and engage high-value leads with an AI prospecting agent.

features.name: ai data agent
features.description: Conversational AI that answers questions about customer data instantly
features.evidence_quote: Get instant answers about your customers with an AI data agent.

features.name: aeo (answer engine optimization)
features.description: Beta tools to track and improve brand visibility in AI search results
features.evidence_quote: Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results

features.name: reporting and analytics dashboards
features.description: Customizable reports and dashboards across marketing, sales, and service data

features.name: knowledge base builder
features.description: Self-service customer knowledge base for deflecting support tickets

features.name: academy and certifications
features.description: Free online courses and industry-recognized certifications covering HubSpot tools and inbound marketing

features.name: integrations marketplace
features.description: App marketplace with thousands of third-party integrations
features.evidence_quote: Connect your favorite apps to HubSpot

features.name: developer api and cms tools
features.description: REST APIs, CMS APIs, and developer tooling for building on the HubSpot platform

features.name: website templates
features.description: Pre-built website and landing page templates for fast deployment

features.name: small business bundle (starter customer platform)
features.description: Bundled starter editions of all hubs sold together at a discount for SMBs
features.evidence_quote: The Starter edition of each product, built for startups and small businesses

features.name: solutions partner directory
features.description: Marketplace of certified HubSpot agency and consultant partners for hire

features.name: onboarding services
features.description: Paid guided onboarding and customer training to accelerate platform adoption

features.name: migration services
features.description: Assisted data migration from other CRM or marketing platforms into HubSpot

features.name: strategic consulting
features.description: HubSpot professional services for go-to-market strategy and platform optimization

features.name: clearbit data enrichment
features.description: B2B contact and company data enrichment via Clearbit (acquired 2023)

features.name: community and user groups
features.description: Online community forums and local HubSpot User Groups for peer learning

features.name: startup partner program
features.description: Discounted access and resources for qualifying early-stage startups

differentiators: All-in-one platform: marketing, sales, service, content, data, and commerce on a single CRM with no stitching required
Free CRM with generous feature set — no credit card required
Breeze AI agents (customer, prospecting, data) embedded natively across the entire platform
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) tools — tracks brand visibility in AI search results (first-mover, beta)
129% more leads, 36% more deals, 37% improvement in ticket closure rates claimed after one year
Enterprise power without sacrificing ease of use — explicit positioning against Salesforce
Clearbit acquisition brings native B2B data enrichment into the CRM
INBOUND annual conference and HubSpot Academy as brand/community moat

recent_ships.what: AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) launched in beta to track and improve brand visibility in AI search results
recent_ships.source: Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results (landing page)

recent_ships.what: Breeze AI platform launched — unified AI agents (customer agent, prospecting agent, data agent, content agent) across all hubs
recent_ships.source: AI agents and features that power the entire platform (landing page)

recent_ships.what: Content Hub launched as a standalone product (evolved from CMS Hub)
Data Hub launched as a standalone product for data management and quality
HubSpot acquires Clearbit for B2B data enrichment

praised: Ease of use relative to Salesforce and enterprise CRM alternatives
Free CRM tier is generous and sufficient for small teams getting started
All-in-one platform reduces tool sprawl and integration headaches
HubSpot Academy certifications valued by marketing and sales professionals
complaints: HubSpot cut 500 jobs (7% of workforce) — raised company stability concerns
Pricing escalates sharply as contact lists grow and advanced features are needed
Culture and scale-up challenges surfaced publicly ('Disrupted' book controversy)

free_tier.limits: Basic CRM only; HubSpot branding on forms/emails; no marketing automation; limited reporting; 1 seat on most tools

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free CRM, contact & deal management, basic email, forms, live chat, tasks, meeting scheduler

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Removes HubSpot branding, adds email reply tracking, simple automation, ad management; priced per hub or as bundle

tiers.name: Starter Customer Platform
tiers.headline_inclusions: Bundled Starter editions of all hubs (Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Ops) at discounted bundle rate for SMBs

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full automation, A/B testing, sequences, custom reporting, team permissions, advanced content tools; per hub pricing

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom objects, SSO, advanced permissions, predictive lead scoring, multi-touch attribution, sandboxes; per hub pricing

pricing.notes: Pricing page was not fully scraped — specific tier prices not captured from source. Each hub (Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Data, Commerce) is priced independently; Marketing Hub pricing is contact-volume-based not seat-based; Sales and Service hubs are per-seat; Commerce Hub is free with transaction fees. Significant price jumps between Starter → Professional and Professional → Enterprise. Annual billing required for best rates.
